sentence: 潜水艇发射了一枚鱼雷。
pinyin: Qiánshuǐtǐng fāshè le yī méi yúléi.

sentence: 科学家正在研究反物质的特性。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā zhèngzài yánjiū fǎnwùzhì de tèxìng.
english: Scientists are studying the properties of antimatter.

sentence: 这首诗写于十九世纪中叶。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu shī xiě yú shíjiǔ shìjì zhōngyè.
english: This poem was written in the mid-nineteenth century.

meaning: 1. to illuminate; 2. to turn on the lights; 3. to light (a blaze)
sentence: 她点亮了蜡烛，整个房间都亮了。
pinyin: Tā diǎnliàng le làzhú, zhěnggè fángjiān dōu liàng le.
english: She lit the candle and the whole room lit up.

meaning: 1. (so as) to avoid; 2. to prevent; 3. (just) in case
pinyin: Dài bǎ yǔsǎn ba, yǐfáng xià yǔ.
english: Bring an umbrella, just in case it rains.
